function.name: hasegawa_mima_nonlinear_check_converge_N
function.description: Conduct a Hasegawa-Mima nonlinear plasma turbulence simulation and evaluate spatial resolution convergence by refining N (*2). Returns {"refined_parameter": str, "current_value": int, "refined_value": int, "norm_RMSE": float, "is_converged": bool, "accumulated_cost": int, "The cost of the solver simulating the environment": int, "The cost of the solver verifying convergence (This will not be included in your accumulated_cost)": int, "wall_time_exceeded": bool}.

N.description: Current grid resolution for spatial discretization

dt.description: Time step size for RK4 integration
